text: Ability to drag to widen the sidebars in Sketch and Execute mode, just like how you can drag to widen the sidebar in Plan mode

proposedTasks.title: Add draggable sidebar resizing to Sketch and Execute phases
proposedTasks.description:
Extend the drag-to-resize sidebar behavior already implemented in Plan mode to the Sketch and Execute phase layouts. Extract the existing resize handle/logic from the Plan sidebar into a shared, reusable component (e.g., ResizableSidebar or a resize hook). Apply it to:

1. **Sketch phase** — the PRD section sidebar and/or the chat panel divider.
2. **Execute phase** — the task detail sidebar and/or the Kanban side panel.

Acceptance criteria:
- Users can click-and-drag the sidebar edge to resize in both Sketch and Execute modes.
- Resize behavior matches the existing Plan mode implementation (cursor style, min/max width constraints, smooth drag tracking).
- Sidebar width preference persists across navigation within a session (in component state or localStorage).
- Resize handle is visually consistent across all three phases.
- No regressions to Plan mode resize behavior.

taskTitles: Add draggable sidebar resizing to Sketch and Execute phases
